title: A few things to know before replacing DC SUN Bucks cards
applyForSebtTitle: We recommend that you fill out an application for this child
applyForSebtBody: Children may not be automatically enrolled because we do not have enough information to confirm their eligibility. But, they may still be eligible.
applyForSebtBody1: The following children *may not be automatically enrolled*.
applyForSebtActionApply: We recommend submitting a DC SUN Bucks application for them
applyForSebtBody2: Children may not be automatically enrolled because we do not have enough information to determine their eligibility. However, they may still be eligible.
applyForSebtBody3: To receive food benefits for Summer 2026, you must apply by [Date]. Applying for DC SUN Bucks usually takes 10 minutes or less.
applyForSebtBody4: After you apply, you will be contacted once your application is reviewed.
applyForSebtAccordionTitle: How do I know if they're eligible?
applyForSebtAccordionBody1: You should apply if your child attends a school that participates in the National School Lunch Program (NSLP) or School Breakfast Program (SBP).
applyForSebtAccordionBody2: Tap here to fill out an application.
applyForSebtAccordionBody3: You may also use the dropdown below to check how much money your household can make in a year to be eligible.
applyForSebtAccordionLabelSelectNumberPe: Select the number of people in your household
applyForSebtAccordionBodyAlertIncome: If your household's total gross income is less than [$28,953] every year, you are likely to be eligible. Gross income is the amount before any deductions, taxes, or expenses are taken out.
applyForSebtCard1Title: To receive benefits for this summer, you must apply by August 25
applyForSebtCard1Body: The sooner you apply, the sooner your application will be reviewed. Applying for DC SUN Bucks usually takes 15 minutes or less.
applyForSebtLibraryApplications: Copies of the paper application are also available year-round at DC public libraries.
applyForSebtCard2Title: Do you have other children in your household?
applyForSebtCard2Body: To check if you need to submit a DC SUN Bucks application for any other school-age children in your household, please provide their information by clicking on the button below.
streamlinedEnrolledTitle: Looks like your child is eligible, and you DO NOT need to submit an application for this child
streamlinedEnrolledBody:
Based on our records, we already have all the information we need to determine your child's DC Sun Bucks eligibility for 2025.

2025 Sun Bucks benefits were issued beginning in June 2025 and expire 122 days after issuance.
streamlinedEnrolledBody1: The following children are *likely automatically enrolled for DC SUN Bucks for 2026*.
streamlinedEnrolledAlertTitle: Check the DC SUN Bucks Portal to see where your children will receive their summer food benefits
streamlinedEnrolledAlertBody:
If they are not enrolled in SNAP or TANF and received DC SUN Bucks cards last summer, we will issue their one-time payment of $120 to the same cards.

If they are not enrolled in SNAP or TANF and new to DC SUN Bucks or their previous card has been deactivated, we will mail a new card to the address we have on file.
streamlinedEnrolledAlertAction: To check the mailing address we have on file, log in to the DC SUN Bucks Portal
streamlinedEnrolledBody2: We recommend logging into the DC SUN Bucks portal to confirm
streamlinedEnrolledBody3: Scroll down to view information we found about your other children.
streamlinedEnrolledAction: Go to the DC SUN Bucks Portal
streamlinedEnrolledCard1Body: If your student has SNAP or TANF, your DC SUN Bucks will be loaded on the existing SNAP or TANF card on that date.
streamlinedEnrolledCard2Title: Do you have other children in your household?
streamlinedEnrolledCard2Body: To check if you need to submit a DC SUN Bucks application for any other school-age children in your household, please provide their information by clicking on the button below.
noneBody1: We don't have enough information for the following children.
noneBody2: We recommend logging into the DC Sun Bucks portal to confirm if they are automatically enrolled.
replaceCardBody1:
You can get a replacement SNAP or TANF EBT card at a DHS EBT Card Office. 

Your DC SUN Bucks benefits will be added to your regular SNAP or TANF benefits. 

Offices are open Monday through Friday, from 7:30 a.m. to 4:45 p.m.
replaceCardBody3:
645 H Street NE, 2nd Floor
1649 Marion Barry Avenue SE
replaceCardBody4: You can get a new DC SUN Bucks card if you need one. Go to the portal dashboard and tap “Request a replacement card” under the child’s name that has benefits issued to a DC SUN Bucks card.
keepCard: Keep your card for next year. Benefits will be added to your new card.
tapToCall: Tap to call Fidelity Information Services (FIS)
subtleLink: I want a replacement for the card ending in [9999] mailed to a different address
body:
Once a replacement card is created, the previous card will be permanently deactivated
Cards will arrive by mail in around 7-10 business days
Any remaining balance on the previous card will automatically be rolled over to the replacement card
summaryAddress: Your new card will be mailed to the following address:
